ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the institution */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date the student graduated (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the student (e.g., active, graduated, withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qualifications" (
  "qualification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each qualification record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who holds this qualification */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the board */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grade */,
  "date_awarded" TEXT /* Date the qualification was awarded */,
  "transcript_url" TEXT /* URL to the digital transcript or certificate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qualification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qualifications_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qualifications_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qualifications_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qualifications_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qualifications_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES boards ("board_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qualifications_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_type" TEXT /* Type of course (e.g., undergraduate, postgraduate) */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisite courses (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boards" (
  "board_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each board */,
  "board_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational board */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the board */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the board */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year record */,
  "year_range" TEXT /* Range of years during which the qualification was obtained */,
  "start_year" TEXT /* Start year of the qualification */,
  "end_year" TEXT /* End year of the qualification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "percentage_range" TEXT /* Percentage range that corresponds to the grade */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Letter grade based on the percentage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, student, faculty) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed and salted password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Date of birth of the student
Date the student enrolled in the institution
Status of the student (e.g., active, graduated, withdrawn)
Unique identifier for each qualification record
Reference to the student who holds this qualification
